note: Corrects an M07 design-stream miscount: worldDraw_rendering and protocol_extensions ARE implemented (the stream grepped only AriadneNativeJob.cpp and missed AriadneProbe.cpp / AriadneProtocol.cpp). Verified against ground truth + codified by tests/unit/test_pump_shutdown_and_deep_native_source.py::{test_custom_entity_worlddraw_present,test_protocol_extension_registered}.

surfaces.name: custom_entity_lifecycle
surfaces.evidence_ref: AriadneProbe : AcDbEntity (AriadneProbe.h:22, ACRX_DECLARE_MEMBERS) registered AriadneProbe::rxInit (AriadneDbxEntry.cpp:68); ops extend.customclass.create / inspect.customclass.count

surfaces.name: worlddraw_rendering
surfaces.evidence_ref: AriadneProbe::subWorldDraw (AriadneProbe.cpp:148, mode->geometry().circle marker) + subGetGeomExtents:156 + subTransformBy:165; render callback compiles into the .dbx and round-trips headless; PIXEL verification (viewport regen) is attended-only

surfaces.name: object_overrules
surfaces.evidence_ref: AriadneObjectOverrule : AcDbObjectOverrule (AriadneNativeJob.cpp:1606); AcRxOverrule::addOverrule(AcDbEntity::desc())+setIsOverruling; ops live.overrule.enable/disable; inspect.overrule.registry; fixtures job_overrule_enable/disable.json

surfaces.name: persistent_reactors
surfaces.evidence_ref: AriadneEditorReactor : AcEditorReactor (AriadneNativeJob.cpp:1557, commandWillStart/commandEnded counters); acedEditor->addReactor; ops live.reactor.enable/disable; disabled on kUnloadAppMsg; callbacks fire only under full_autocad

surfaces.name: editor_jigs
surfaces.evidence_ref: AriadneLineJig : AcEdJig (AriadneNativeJob.cpp:1695); runLineJigProbe host-gates to full_autocad with reason 'AcEdJig drag requires the full AutoCAD editor interaction loop'; op live.jig.point_probe; class compiles+registered, interactive drag attended-only

surfaces.name: custom_object_filer_versioning
surfaces.evidence_ref: AriadneRecord : AcDbObject (AriadneRecord.cpp) ACRX_DXF_DEFINE_MEMBERS; dwgOut writes kAriadneRecordVersion=1 int16+value; dwgIn returns Acad::eMakeMeProxy on newer; dxf mirrors; accoreconsole save+reload roundtrip

surfaces.name: protocol_extensions
surfaces.evidence_ref: AriadneProbeProtocol : AcRxObject (AriadneProtocol.h:6); AriadneProbe::desc()->addX(AriadneProbeProtocol::desc(),...) (AriadneProtocol.cpp:26) registered in AriadneDbxEntry.cpp; op inspect.protocol.queryx (AriadneNativeJob.cpp:2920) reports probe_protocol_available

surfaces.name: acrxproperty_opm
surfaces.evidence_ref: no AcRxProperty code (grep clean). AcRxProperty REGISTRATION is headless-feasible but its purpose is the OPM Properties palette, an MFC GUI absent in accoreconsole; deferred to a dedicated attended packet. Exact blocker: Properties panel render + per-property edit only exercisable in attended acad.exe (PID 49460 must not be driven)

surfaces.name: selection_monitor
surfaces.evidence_ref: no selection-monitor code (grep clean). A real monitor reacts to the interactive pick stream; acedEditor is null headless so callbacks never fire. Registration would mirror AriadneEditorReactor but live events are attended-only; deferred. Exact blocker: selection-change callbacks require attended acad.exe

surfaces.name: palette_status_ui
surfaces.evidence_ref: no palette/status code (grep clean). CAcUiDockControlBar / AcApStatusBar are MFC GUI on acad.exe's UI thread; accoreconsole has no MFC main window or message pump. Cannot instantiate/render headless; must not inject into the user's session

decision_no_new_native_stubs: Did NOT add headless AcRxProperty / selection-monitor registration stubs: their ObjectARX 2027 signatures are unverified (aceditor.h/rxproperty.h not at canonical inc path), their function is attended-GUI-only regardless, and Rule 2/3 + no-fake-success favor honest hard-block over a risky build-breaking stub. The substantial M07 native advance is the live pump expansion (5 new ops + CADAGENT_STATUS), fully headless-verified.
attended_followup_packet: the 3 attended_blocked surfaces + attended live-pump proof belong to a dedicated attended packet that loads the .arx into an agent-drivable AutoCAD
